title: ProjectionConfig
description: Runtime configuration for projecting the internal canonical candidate record into a requested output shape without changing extraction, normalization, or merge code.

name.description: Optional logical name for this output profile.

fields.description: Requested output fields mapped from canonical paths.

include_provenance.description: Whether to include provenance in the projected output. Internal provenance is still calculated.

include_confidence.description: Whether to include confidence values in the projected output. Internal confidence is still calculated.

missing_default.description: Default behavior when a requested canonical path is unavailable.

validation_mode.description: Strict mode fails validation on missing:error or invalid output types; lenient mode returns warnings where safe.

additional_output_properties.description: Whether projected output may contain properties not explicitly requested. Recommended false.

output_name.description: Field name to emit in the projected output.

path.description: Canonical field path, for example full_name, location.city, or links.linkedin.

type.description: Optional expected output type after projection and normalization.

normalization.description: Optional output-specific normalization rule or ordered list of rules.

required.description: Convenience flag. If true, implementation should treat missing as error unless explicitly set otherwise.

include_provenance.description: Optional field-level override for provenance exposure.

include_confidence.description: Optional field-level override for confidence exposure.
